beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Brest vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 17
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Brest vs Auxerre - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 17
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Brest have lost just one of their last eight matches against Auxerre in all competitions : a 3-0 defeat in Burgundy on 27 September 2024, which was the only game in this run where SB29 failed to score. Brest have lost three of their last four opening Ligue 1 matches of a calendar year, after winning each of their previous four such games.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lorient vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 17
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lorient vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 17
